name: Epica
short_description: Journey into the magical world of Epica, a saga awaits you.
detailed_description:
Journey into the magical world of Epica and compete against other players from around the world in the rankings.

Game Features

  • A fantasy adventure & exploration game.

  • Dynamic combat

  • Crafting & trading

  • Global rankings

  • Hardcore mode

  • Progression system

  • Steam achievements

State of Epica

The game is accessible during Early Access, the core development stage. The game went through several major updates, including the upgrade from Unreal Engine 4 to 5, and newer changes preparing the game for multiplayer.   

The current scope centers on bringing the starting zone (Act 1) to life, which includes:

  • Player skills

  • Player gear 

  • Various world locations

  • Character development

  • Quests
